column1: round(sum(case when o.main_card_type in(7)then (o.creditcard_amount/o.currency_rate) else 0 end ),2)as Prime,

column2: (sum(case when o.creditcard_amount>0 and o.installments_count>1 then (o.pin_cost/o.currency_rate)*0.0025 else 0 end ))+ --as CCB_Estimated,
(sum(case when o.main_card_type in (44) and o.creditcard_amount>0 or o.wallet_amount>0 then 1 else 0 end)*0.07) + --as pix,

column1: left join users u on o.userid=u.userid
and (u.category is null OR u.category not like '%qa%')
